ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., Phase I, Phase II, observational) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "ethics_committee_approval" INTEGER /* Indicates if the study has received ethical approval */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the study */,
  "current_budget_spent" TEXT /* Budget spent so far */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Main contact person for the study */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the study */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_dimensions" (
  "quality_dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality dimension */,
  "quality_dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality dimension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality dimension */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the quality dimension */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the quality dimension */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quality dimension was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quality dimension was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quality dimension is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extraction_forms" (
  "extraction_form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extraction form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the extraction form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the extraction form */,
  "form_version" TEXT /* Version of the extraction form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the form was last updated */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the form is associated with */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., baseline, follow-up) */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* Status of the form (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the form */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extraction_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extraction_forms_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_dimension_fields" (
  "quality_dimension_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality dimension field */,
  "quality_dimension_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality dimension the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., text, date, number) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field is mandatory */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the field */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_dimension_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_dimension_fields_quality_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_dimension_id") REFERENCES quality_dimensions ("quality_dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "quality_dimension_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quality dimension field the data point belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the data point is associated with */,
  "extraction_form_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the extraction form the data point is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was last updated */,
  "data_point_status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User who reviewed the data point */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was reviewed */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the data point */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the data point was approved */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data point is locked and cannot be modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_extraction_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("extraction_form_id") REFERENCES extraction_forms ("extraction_form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_quality_dimension_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_dimension_field_id") REFERENCES quality_dimension_fields ("quality_dimension_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_studies" (
  "user_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-study association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "role_in_study" TEXT /* Role of the user in the study (e.g., principal investigator, data collector) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user-study association */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user-study association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-study association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-study association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_studies_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_studies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "data_point_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point in this version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the data point in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_audits" (
  "data_point_audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point audit log */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  "action_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the action performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the audit log */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the audit log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_audits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_audits_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_audits_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_audits_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
